channel.title: Orthodox Christian Sermons: Feasts of the Saints:August 20
channel.description: Audio Orthodox Christian Sermons: Feasts of the Saints:August 20

item.title: Feasts of the Saints, Great Martyr Phanurios Of Rhodes, 2012-09-08
item.description: :Feasts of the Saints. Talk on Great Martyr Phanutios of Rhodes, including details about his icon, his known ability to help people find things, and his request that people pray for the soul of his sinful mother, and phanuropita. There is also a lesson to learn in how and when Holy Phanurios was revealled to the world - this has DIRECT application to our lives.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :Feasts of the Saints. Talk on Great Martyr Phanutios of Rhodes, including details about his icon, his known ability to help people find things, and his request that people pray for the soul of his sinful mother, and phanuropita. There is also a lesson to learn in how and when Holy Phanurios was revealled to the world - this has DIRECT application to our lives.

item.title: Feasts of the Saints, Prophet Samuel, 2012-09-01
item.description: :Feasts of the Saints. The Holy Prophet Samuel teaches us how to approach EVERYTHING in life. The manner of the birth and calling of Samuel is also mentioned.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :Feasts of the Saints. The Holy Prophet Samuel teaches us how to approach EVERYTHING in life. The manner of the birth and calling of Samuel is also mentioned.
